title: Public service guide and HOME discovery entry
summary: 비로그인 공개 /about 가이드, PRIMARY_WEB_NAV_ITEMS 5메뉴, HOME 집밥 둘러보기 guide+theme rail, MYPAGE 임시 도움말 제거를 FE-only로 구현한다.
goal: 처음 방문한 사용자가 서비스의 5단계 흐름을 이해하고 웹 공통 메뉴나 HOME에서 같은 공개 가이드로 진입하며, 기존 사용자가 중복 MYPAGE 도움말 없이 FAQ를 찾게 한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; user discontinued Claude
owners.codex: stage1 docs owner in this session; stage4 implementation, stage5-6 review, docs repair, final authority, and closeout must use role-separated Codex sessions

out_of_scope: Community, suggestion board, comments, voting, reports, moderation
Fifth mobile bottom tab or separate HOME guide banner
API, DB, schema, auth contract changes
Unverified marketing metrics or fake contact channel
HOME fixed prototype refreeze or global token replacement
HOME visual changes outside the user-approved discovery rail supersession
notes: Stage 1 docs prepared on docs/service-about-guide after PR #977 merged and approved by a separate Codex internal docs-gate reviewer after required validators passed. The lifecycle remains planned until the docs PR merges; FE-only Stage 2/3 stay skipped. User-approved addendum narrowly supersedes HOME exact prototype only for the discovery rail position and guide card contract. automation-spec generic generator_artifact/critic_artifact point to the canonical ABOUT screen artifacts; required_screens includes ABOUT_SERVICE_GUIDE and HOME, while HOME auxiliary authority is governed by ui/designs/HOME.md and ui/designs/critiques/HOME-service-about-guide-critique.md. Claude is forbidden; writing/implementation sessions cannot self-approve and repair/final authority use separate Codex sessions.
